raw_text:
CloudWeave Systems

Building scalable, distributed systems that power the modern data economy

INTERN BACKEND ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) · Internship · $28-$35/hour

Join CloudWeave Systems as a Backend Engineer Intern and get hands-on experience building and maintaining
scalable microservices. You'll work alongside senior engineers to develop REST APIs, implement data persistence

layers, and contribute to our core platform services. This is an excellent opportunity to apply computer science
fundamentals to real-world distributed systems while learning industry best practices in backend development.

ABOUT US

CloudWeave Systems is a San Francisco-based infrastructure software company founded in 2019. We specialize in
developing cloud-native data platforms and microservices orchestration tools for enterprises. Our mission is to
simplify distributed systems architecture and enable organizations to build reliable, high-performance applications.

We serve Fortune 500 companies across finance, healthcare, and e-commerce sectors.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Develop and maintain REST APIs in Go and Python under the guidance of senior engineers

Implement and optimize database queries using PostgreSQL and Redis for caching layers

Participate in code reviews and learn best practices for writing maintainable, testable backend code

Debug and troubleshoot issues in microservices running in Docker containers and Kubernetes

Collaborate with the team to design and implement new features for our core data pipeline

Write unit tests and integration tests to ensure code quality and reliability

Document API specifications and internal services to improve team knowledge sharing

REQUIRED

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related
field

Strong foundation in at least one backend language: Python, Go, or Java

Understanding of relational databases and SQL fundamentals

Familiarity with Git and version control workflows

Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and communicate technical concepts clearly

NICE TO HAVE

 Experience with REST API design and HTTP fundamentals

Exposure to Docker or containerization concepts

Familiarity with microservices architecture or distributed systems concepts

Previous experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL

TECH STACK

Go   Python   PostgreSQL   Redis

  Docker

  Kubernetes

  REST APIs

  Git

  RabbitMQ   Linux

BENEFITS

Competitive hourly rate commensurate with experience

Flexible work schedule with remote work options

Mentorship from experienced backend engineers

Free access to professional development courses and certifications

Lunch and snacks provided in office (when on-site)

Opportunity to work on real production systems impacting thousands of users

HOW TO APPLY

Submit your resume, a cover letter describing your interest in backend engineering, and a GitHub profile or
portfolio link (if available) to careers@cloudweave.io. Include any personal or academic projects that demonstrate
your backend development skills. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
